targets.$comment: Populate with per-method target values once Phase 1 produces baseline data. Example: { "SendCommand.mean_ns_max": 2000, "SendCommand.allocated_bytes_max": 4096 }

stabilityOverrides.$comment: Keys are matched as 'ClassName.Method' or 'ClassName.Method(Params)'. The Refit benchmarks call a mocked HTTP handler that has inherent task-scheduler variance; the numbers are meaningful for order-of-magnitude comparisons but not stable for regression detection.
stabilityOverrides.RestApiRequestHandlerBenchmarks.EncinaRe: 10-call batch over a mocked Refit handler; CoV 18% at N=30 is inherent to the async-task-scheduler jitter, not code drift.
stabilityOverrides.RestApiRequestHandlerBenchmarks.DirectRe: Single mocked Refit call; CoV 17% at N=30 is inherent to the async-task-scheduler jitter.
5 sequential mocked Refit calls; CoV 12% at N=28 is inherent.
